The contact owns a 2016 Lincoln MKC. The contact stated while reversing, the rearview camera image was distorted or black. There was no warning light illuminated. The dealer was notified of the failure. The vehicle was not diagnosed or repaired. The manufacturer was not notified

narrative.headline: What 2016 Lincoln Mkc owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 76 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (53% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
